daily_summary.headline: Routine Launches and Minor Aurora Activity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-17
top_events.description: A standard launch of 25 Starlink satellites into low Earth orbit by SpaceX using the Falcon 9 Block 5 rocket.
top_events.action: Watch the live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Aurora Forecast for March 24
top_events.description: Minor geomagnetic activity with a maximum Kp index of 4.67, offering a low probability of aurora visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check conditions if located above 65° latitude.

top_events.title: Electron | Daughter Of The Stars (LEO-PNT Pathfinder A)
top_events.description: Launch of two ESA Pathfinder satellites to test navigation technologies in low Earth orbit.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
